meaning: n.举起,电梯,起重机,搭车vt.升高,提高,举起,空运vi.升起,(指雾等)消散,耸立
examples: There is a lift to all floors.
Come and help me lift this box.
She hitched a lift on a truck.
The expectation of increased spending on roads and railways has helped to lift raw-material prices.
We got a lift from our first goal and we always looked a threat after that.
